name: the whole-tree audit without a profile flags the violating repo red exactly as before (default-preserving across the audit path)
command:
mkdir -p repo && printf 'apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
spec:
  containers:
  - securityContext:
      privileged: true
' > repo/pod.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-audit.sh" --root repo 2>a.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'status=red' a.txt && echo audit-baseline-unchanged 1>&2
